events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario involves a missing secondary bonding jumper (SDS) on transformers at rough-complete stage. This is a bonding/grounding compliance issue per NEC 250.30 for separately derived systems. Missing bonding jumper means the SDS is not properly bonded, which is a safety hazard. This is non-compliant and installed-defective. Decision should be fail. Risk is high because missing bonding jumper on a separately derived system can create dangerous touch voltage and fault clearing issues.
